text: I was just wondering if you guys are ever gonna offer a way to manage our data ourselves? Seems like everyone is moving towards that, but I couldn't find any info on it. Also, I'm kinda worried about the privacy thing, ya know?
Hey, so I was just wondering if you guys have any plans to maybe bring back that feature where we could track our orders? I mean, I kinda miss it! Anyway, keep up the good work!
I recently made a purchase and I believe there has been an error with the order. Could you assist me in getting a refund?
I tried logging in, but it keeps saying my info's wrong. Also, are my points still valid? It's kinda weird.
Hi, I ordered a blender last month but it came without the manual. Oh, and also I think my pizza got delivered late yesterday, can I still get my money back for that blender?
my email is wrong in the accnt. tried to change it but it wont let me. any ideas?
I’m trying to log in, but it just takes me back to the login screen! Also, my dog is barking at the mailman, so I hope it’s not something serious with my account.

I ordered a gift for my sister's birthday a week ago, and it just hasn’t arrived yet. I’m really worried because I paid for express shipping, and the tracking hasn’t updated in days. Could someone please look into this for me? I was counting on this gift being on time!

I've been a loyal customer for several years, but I'm really disappointed with the latest update to your app. It feels cluttered and harder to navigate than before. I just wanted to let you know how frustrating this has been for me as I rely on it for my daily tasks.
I’ve been waiting for a response about my order for what feels like forever. Can someone please help me out here?
I really thought I picked the monthly plan, but now I see I was charged for the whole year! Can you plz help me with this? I'm kind of upset about it.
So, I bought this thing and it doesn’t work, can I get my money back?

I am encountering a peculiar issue with the software. It seems to freeze every time I attempt to access the advanced settings, even after I cleared the cache. Additionally, I have tried several troubleshooting steps, but the problem persists. I noticed that my operating system is up to date, but I'm uncertain if there could be any compatibility issues with the latest version of your application, which is also the latest version available. Any insight would be appreciated.

I recently noticed a charge for a subscription I did not authorize, and it appears to be an annual plan. I intended to opt for the monthly subscription only. Could you assist me in rectifying this issue and possibly processing a refund?
I ordered a book and a lamp, but I only got the lamp. Can I get my money back for the book?

I've been using your service for quite a while, but lately, I've noticed some inconsistencies that are really troubling me. For instance, I received a reminder for an event that I had already resolved weeks ago, and I've missed important notifications because of it. I've tried reaching out before, but the responses haven't been very helpful, which is why I'm feeling compelled to voice my dissatisfaction more thoroughly this time. Can you please look into this situation? It feels really frustrating to deal with these issues repeatedly without a proper resolution.
